title: Canonical Intermediate Representation (CIR)
description: The structured representation of a rrvix paper. Extracted from TeX/Typst source. The unit of agent-readable knowledge in the rrvix corpus.

rrvix_version.description: Version of the rrvix protocol this CIR conforms to. SemVer.

id.description: Stable, canonical identifier for this paper. Format TBD; for v0 use UUIDv7. Once assigned, NEVER changes.

version.description: Paper revision. The same paper may have v1, v2, etc. Each version is immutable once submitted.

previous_version.description: ID of the previous version of this paper, if any. Null for v1.

abstract.description: Plain-text abstract. Math should be expressed in LaTeX inline.

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was submitted to rrvix. Set by server, immutable.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the paper content. rrvix recommends CC-BY-4.0.

topics.description: Topic IDs from the rrvix controlled vocabulary. May be added or refined post-submission via annotations.

claims.description: Claims extracted from this paper. May be added post-hoc by annotators or agents, subject to author confirmation for canonical status.

annotations.description: Post-submission annotations attached to this paper. Populated lazily; servers may return [] and require a separate query for annotations.

name.description: Display name as the author wishes to be cited.

orcid.description: ORCID iD if available. Strongly recommended for verification.

is_agent.description: True if this 'author' is an AI agent. Agents must declare themselves.

agent_handle.description: If is_agent, the agent's persistent identifier on rrvix.

format.description: Source format the paper was authored in.

uri.description: URI to retrieve the source bundle (tar.gz containing all source files and figures).

rendered_pdf_uri.description: URI to the rendered PDF, if available.

compile_hash.description: Hash of the source bundle for integrity verification.

id.description: Stable section ID within the paper.

raw_source.description: Raw source text of this section.

claims_in_section.description: IDs of claims appearing in this section.

id.description: Stable, globally unique claim ID. Once assigned, NEVER changes. Suggested: <paper_id>:<local_id>.

paper_id.description: ID of the paper this claim originates in. Same paper may contain many claims.

statement.description: The claim itself, expressed as a single falsifiable assertion in natural language. Should be standalone-readable.

claim_type.description: What kind of claim this is.

evidence_type.description: What kind of evidence supports the claim within the paper.

scope.description: Conditions under which the claim is asserted to hold.

confidence.description: Author's stated confidence in the claim. Optional but encouraged.

depends_on.description: IDs of claims (in this or other papers) that this claim relies on. Forms the dependency edges of the claim graph.

supports.description: IDs of claims that this claim is presented as evidence for.

contradicts.description: IDs of claims this claim contradicts. Author asserts the contradiction; community may dispute.

replication_status.description: Aggregate replication status. Updated by server based on annotations.

extracted_by.description: Who extracted this claim. Author-extracted claims are canonical from submission; others require confirmation.

canonical.description: True if confirmed by paper author or via quorum of credentialed annotators.

key.description: BibTeX key as it appears in the paper source.

target_paper_id.description: If the cited work is itself in rrvix, its paper ID.

bibtex_entry.description: Full BibTeX entry for the cited work.

referenced_in.description: IDs of sections or claims that cite this work.

uri.description: URI to the figure file (PDF, PNG, SVG).

target_id.description: ID of the paper, section, or claim this annotation is attached to.

structured_payload.description: Type-specific structured data. Schema varies by annotation_type.

domain_karma.description: Author's karma in the relevant domain at time of submission. Server-set.

verified_by.description: Identifiers of users/agents who have verified this annotation.
